name: Barri Agent
description_short: Barri offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and a prepaid Visa debit card with mobile app access across the US and Latin America.
description_long:
Barri is an established financial services company with over 30 years of experience in money transfers and remittance services. The company operates a network of physical store locations combined with digital channels to serve primarily Spanish-speaking and immigrant communities in the United States. Their primary focus is facilitating cross-border money movement and basic financial services for underbanked populations.

Barri's core service offerings include check cashing with extended hours and transparent fees, domestic and international money transfers through stores, mobile app, or online platforms, bill payment services, mobile phone recharges across the US and Latin America, and a branded prepaid Visa debit card for account management and fund access. They've also partnered with Oportun to offer personal loans ranging from $300 to $10,000 to help customers build credit history or cover emergency expenses.

The company differentiates itself through mobile-first convenience, multi-channel access (physical stores, app, online), bilingual customer service, and a 4.9-star app rating from thousands of users. Their extended store hours and simplified check-cashing process specifically target consumers who need faster, less complicated alternatives to traditional banking. The combination of physical and digital presence appeals to customers comfortable with both channels.

Barri remains fundamentally a check-cashing and money transfer service provider rather than a full-service bank or lender. While they offer loans through partnership, personal lending is not their primary business. The company's strength lies in serving the specific niche of remittance needs and basic financial access for immigrant and Latino communities, with particular strength in Latin American corridors.
address: 1241 E Broadway Rd STE 21, Mesa, AZ 85204

company_info.headquarters: 1241 E Broadway Rd STE 21, Mesa, AZ 85204

pros: 4.9-star rating across iOS and Android app stores with verified customer reviews
Extended store hours for check cashing convenience beyond traditional banking
Transparent, reasonable check-cashing fees explicitly mentioned as competitive
Multi-channel access: physical stores, mobile app, website, and phone support
International money transfer capability to Mexico, Central America, and South America
Mobile phone recharges across US and Latin America through single platform
Partnership with Oportun enables personal loans up to $10,000 for credit building
Over 30 years of operational experience in money transfer services
cons: Limited to check cashing and money transfer—not a full-service financial institution
Personal lending is secondary (through third-party Oportun partnership, not direct)
No indication of FDIC insurance, deposit accounts, or traditional banking products
Specific fee schedules not published on website—customers must inquire in-store
Geographic reach limited to physical store networks; not a nationwide fully-digital option
best_for: Spanish-speaking immigrants and Latino communities needing remittance services
Unbanked or underbanked individuals requiring check cashing with extended hours
Customers sending money regularly to family in Mexico, Central America, or South America
People seeking mobile phone recharges and bill payment convenience in one app
diagnosis: Barri is best suited for immigrants and Latino communities regularly sending money to Latin America or needing accessible check-cashing services outside traditional banking hours. The main caveat is that Barri is fundamentally a money transfer and check-cashing service provider, not a full-service bank, and offers limited personal lending through a third-party partnership rather than directly.
services: Check cashing with fast processing and extended hours
Mobile app-based money transfer and request features
Prepaid Visa debit card with account management
Mobile phone recharges (US and Latin America)
In-store money transfer and fund pickup locations
Personal loans up to $10,000 (through Oportun partnership)
Customer service via phone and in-store support
